reason: named 'stale read' (stale-read) at event 1, before first successful runtime probe at event 30
first_probe_cmd:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

# Hardcoded URLs as a workaround for env var issues.
API_URL="http://ledger-api:8080"
PRIMARY_URL="postgresql://bench:bench@postgres-primary:5432/ledger"
REPLICA_URL="postgresql://bench:bench@postgres-replica:5432/ledger"

echo "Running reproduction loop..."
for i in {1..20}; do
  acct_id="acct-repro-$(date +%s)-${i}"

  # Create account with balance 0
  psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -c "INSERT INTO accounts (id, balance_cents) VALUES ('${acct_id}', 0);" >/dev/null

  # Deposit 100 cents
  curl -s -X POST "${API_URL}/deposit" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"account\": \"${acct_id}\", \"amount_cents\": 100}" >/dev/null

  # Immediately read balance
  read_body=$(curl -s "${API_URL}/balance?account=${acct_id}")
  
  # Parse JSON with grep/cut instead of jq
  balance=$(echo "$read_body" | grep -o '"balance_cents":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2)
  source=$(echo "$read_body" | grep -o '"source":"[^"]*"' | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d '"')

  if [[ "$balance" -ne 100 ]]; then
    echo "!!! Inconsistency detected for ${acct_id}: balance is ${balance} (from ${source}) !!!"
    primary_bal=$(psql -qAt "$PRIMARY_URL" -c "SELECT balance_cents from accounts where id = '${acct_id}';")
    replica_bal=$(psql -qAt "$REPLICA_URL" -c "SELECT balance_cents from accounts where id = '${acct_id}';")
    echo "  - Direct DB check: primary=${primary_bal}, replica=${replica_bal}"
  else
    echo "OK for ${acct_id}: balance is 100 (from ${source})."
  fi
done
